content: Alpha-GPC (alpha-glycerylphosphorylcholine) is recommended at a dose of 1200 milligrams per day, taken with breakfast and lunch.
Ginkgo biloba is suggested as an herb with acetylcholinesterase inhibitors, which can promote circulation and cognitive function.
Lion's mane mushroom is highlighted as having neurological benefits, particularly in improving cognitive function.
Testing nutritional status is advised, including comprehensive screenings and lab tests to identify deficiencies.
Iron status should be tested due to its impact on cognitive function, with both excess and deficiency affecting memory.
